posts.text: Corporate insiders are buying tech stocks at a record pace: 28 executives at companies within the US technology sector ETF, $XLK, have purchased their own stock on the open market over the last 6 months, the highest count on record, according to SentimenTrader. This figure has DOUBLED since the start of 2026. This also surpasses the previous record of 25 insiders set in 2011. By comparison, in early 2025, just 5 executives were buyers. US executives are rushing to buy tech stocks.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Just been on @abcnews Radio Perth Mornings with Nadia talking the India Australia #uranium deal and what that means for the current WA mining ban. This is getting a lot of media attention. Thats a good thing. $CXU. Replay will be available here later: https://www.abc.net.au/listen/programs/perth-mornings
